overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a dark dirt path during a stormy night. The scene features heavy rain, dark storm clouds, and limited visibility, rendered in a cinematic game engine style with atmospheric lighting and weather effects.

events.description: bright lightning flash briefly illuminates the left side of the scene
rain becomes visibly heavier, creating a dense atmospheric haze

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dark dirt path through the stormy forest

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the forest, wet from rain
tall grass and vegetation lining the left side of the path
tall grass and vegetation lining the right side of the path
dark turbulent storm clouds covering the night sky
silhouetted trees visible on the horizon against the stormy sky

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along a narrow dirt path through a stormy forest at night. Tall grass lines both sides of the trail while dark storm clouds fill the sky above. A lightning flash briefly illuminates the scene around the 3-second mark, followed by increasingly heavy rain that reduces visibility and creates a dense atmospheric haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark forest trail that descends into a state of near-total atmospheric occlusion. It begins by advancing along a narrow dirt path flanked by tall grass under a canopy of heavy storm clouds. As the camera pushes deeper into the woods, a sudden flash of lightning briefly illuminates the surrounding wilderness, cutting through the gloom. The scene then shifts as the rain intensifies, rapidly reducing visibility and enveloping the path in a dense, oppressive haze.
